headline: AI for Disaster Prediction: Earthquake Forecasting, Flood Detection, and Early Warning Systems
description: AI is becoming humanity's early warning system -- predicting floods days in advance, detecting wildfires from satellite imagery, and providing earthquake alerts seconds before shaking arrives. From Google's Flood Hub covering 80+ countries to AI-powered tsunami buoys, machine learning gives communities precious minutes to hours of lead time that save lives.

citation.name: Deep artificial intelligence applications for natural disaster management systems: A methodological review
AI-Driven Disaster Prediction and Early Warning Systems: A Systematic Literature Review
